title: centaurium pulchellum f. album
intro: Centaurium pulchellum f. album, also known as white centaury, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the gentian family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is known to have a bitter taste. The health benefits of Centaurium pulchellum f. album include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Centaurium pulchellum f. album include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from digestive problems to respiratory infections.
